config.seed_text: A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: The words they contained grew louder so that there seemed no danger for their meaning to change unless some other source remained hidden or buried away somewhere else. They became less accurate as word memory changed from one's mind into another. A new type of information retrieval would help us make decisions about whether we should read this code when you do not like them; how many times can I see something? We must find out where our original thought went before those who might come back later than what is written right now! This approach has been used several times today (see section 2). Here we will examine each problem with an intuitive understanding of why such patterns occur

TEXT:
A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware. The words they contained grew louder so that there seemed no danger for their meaning to change unless some other source remained hidden or buried away somewhere else. They became less accurate as word memory changed from one's mind into another. A new type of information retrieval would help us make decisions about whether we should read this code when you do not like them; how many times can I see something? We must find out where our original thought went before those who might come back later than what is written right now! This approach has been used several times today (see section 2). Here we will examine each problem with an intuitive understanding of why such patterns occur
